task_completion.description: Import the regional survey data from foothills_regional.csv
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an import file dialog targeting 'C:\workspace\data\foothills_regional.csv' or a large set of points loaded into the main workspace.

task_completion.description: Create a rectangular boundary (Polilínea) with the specified coordinates
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the polyline (Polilínea) tool being used, coordinate input fields, or a drawn rectangle corresponding to the coordinates (476500, 4399800) to (476700, 4400000).

task_completion.description: Filter the survey points to include only those within the boundary
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for points outside the boundary being deleted, or a selection/filtering tool being applied to isolate the points strictly inside the drawn rectangular boundary.

task_completion.description: Export the interior points to site_filtered.csv
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an export or save dialog targeting 'C:\workspace\data\site_filtered.csv' with the filtered points.
Look for a save project dialog targeting 'C:\workspace\data\site_project.top' or the application title bar displaying 'site_project.top'.

integrity.description: Agent used the application GUI to perform the tasks
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent interacted with the graphical user interface of the surveying/CAD software (e.g., TopoCal) rather than writing Python scripts or using terminal commands to process the CSV.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the correct software
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the screenshots show a CAD or surveying application (like TopoCal) being used, not just a text editor or spreadsheet program.

integrity.description: Results were generated by the application
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the export and save actions were performed through the application's native dialogs, rather than manually creating files with dummy data.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Input CSV: C:\workspace\data\foothills_regional.csv. Boundary coordinates: X from 476500 to 476700, Y from 4399800 to 4400000. Output CSV: C:\workspace\data\site_filtered.csv. Output Project: C:\workspace\data\site_project.top.
